title: MetadataSet
description: A set of metadata fields (system and custom) for an asset. This schema is suitable for standalone export/import of complete metadata field definitions—including field types and enum values—independently from assets.

set_id.description: Unique identifier for the metadata set.

label.description: Human-readable label for the metadata set.

type.description: Data type of the field. Use 'enum' for dropdown or multi-select fields.

enum_values.description: Allowed values if type is enum (dropdown or multi-select).

multi_select.description: If true, field is a multi-select (user can select multiple values). If false or omitted, field is a single-select dropdown. Applies only to type 'enum'.

schema_version.description: Version of the metadata set schema used to create this record. Follows semantic versioning (e.g., '1.0.0'). Optional but recommended for evolution and compatibility checks.

extensions.description: Extension point for custom fields or plugin data. Keys SHOULD be prefixed with 'x_' or 'custom_' to avoid collision with future standard fields.
